grammatical: Ik weet dat Jan de kinderen zag zwemmen.
ungrammatical: Ik weet dat Jan de kinderen zwemmen zag.
source: adapted from Bresnan, Kaplan, Peters & Zaenen (1982), Example 1
notes: zien + zwemmen is a plausible Dutch bigram; bigram_confound flagged for inspection in mechanistic analysis.

grammatical: Ik weet dat Jan de kinderen zag zwemmen.
ungrammatical: Ik weet dat de kinderen Jan zag zwemmen.
source: adapted from Bresnan, Kaplan, Peters & Zaenen (1982), Example 1
notes: Ungrammaticality driven by subject-verb agreement violation (de kinderen + zag: plural subject, singular verb), not NP-verb alignment. Do not use for alignment-specific analysis. zien + zwemmen is a plausible Dutch bigram; bigram_confound flagged for inspection in mechanistic analysis.

grammatical: Ik weet dat Jan de kinderen zag zwemmen.
ungrammatical: Ik weet dat de kinderen Jan zwemmen zag.
source: adapted from Bresnan, Kaplan, Peters & Zaenen (1982), Example 1
notes: Alignment restored by double reversal; ungrammaticality still present via agreement violation (de kinderen + zag). zien + zwemmen is a plausible Dutch bigram; bigram_confound flagged for inspection in mechanistic analysis. Human validation required.
